top_items.title: AI Coding Tools for Knowledge Work: What Executives Need to Know
top_items.one_liner: Executives underestimate AI coding tools like Claude Code — argues agentic assistants transform knowledge work far beyond software development.

top_items.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code

top_items.title: The technical leap where most brilliant AI initiatives spectacularly fail
top_items.one_liner: Most AI initiatives stall at the prototype-to-production leap — a strategic read for advisory conversations with senior clients.
